title: trisetum ciliare
intro: Trisetum ciliare, also known as fringed barley grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Trisetum ciliare include its potential to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea by infusing its leaves and stems in hot water, or it can be used in capsule or tincture form after proper processing and standardization.
